safetyZones.notes: Upscale area, well-patrolled. Busy roads during day. Quieter after 11 PM.
Affluent residential area. Generally safe. Some isolated stretches at night.
IT corridor, well-lit and busy until late. Metro connectivity is good.
IT hub with good infrastructure. Some areas under construction can feel isolated.
Crowded market areas. Be alert in the station area, especially at night.
Very crowded during the day. Narrow lanes. Avoid walking alone after dark. Keep valuables hidden.
Airport is well-secured. Surrounding area is sparse. Use pre-booked cabs at night.
Residential and commercial mix. Busy but some poorly lit stretches.
IT area with lots of restaurants and nightlife. Generally safe and well-lit.
Outer area. Less police presence at night. Use cabs for late travel.

fareBenchmarks.notes: Ola/Uber is 700-900. Prepaid taxi at airport is 900-1100.
30-45 min depending on traffic. Surge pricing can push it to 1200+.
45-60 min. Heavy traffic on NH44 during rush hours.
Blue line metro. 20 min, no traffic. Best option.
Minimum fare 30. Per km ~15-20. Always negotiate or use meter. Common scam: refusing meter.

scamAlerts.description: Auto drivers at the airport often quote 2-3x the normal fare. Use Ola/Uber or the prepaid taxi counter inside the terminal.
Auto drivers near the station frequently refuse meters and quote inflated prices. Walk 100m away from the station to get a fair fare.
Self-appointed guides at Charminar offering 'special access'. There's no special access. Politely decline.
Some shops in Laad Bazaar sell fake pearls as real Hyderabadi pearls. Buy only from certified shops. Real pearls feel gritty when rubbed against teeth.
Cab/auto drivers recommending specific hotels or restaurants usually get commission. Stick to your pre-booked accommodation.

localTips: Hyderabad metro is clean, cheap, and safe — use it whenever possible
Biryani tip: Paradise is touristy but decent. Locals prefer Bawarchi or Shah Ghouse
Google Maps works well here. Download offline maps just in case
Water: always drink bottled. Check the seal is intact
Peak traffic hours: 8-10 AM and 5-8 PM. Plan around these
Telugu and Hindi are widely spoken. English works in IT areas and malls
